case_title: JOSEPH P MCGOVERN VS. INTERNATIONAL PERFORMING ARTS ACADEMY, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,490.00 FILED BY MCGOVERN, JOSEPH P AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL PERFORMING ARTS ACADEMY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-08-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL PERFORMING ARTS ACADEMY, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
